title: Winter Survival
description: In the Winter Survival, you will challenge the deadly cold and dangerous world. But the main battle will unfold inside: try to survive not only in reality, but also among the hallucinations generated by your own consciousness.
body:
It can be a challenge to survive, but give it a try.
You'll need to find a shelter or build one yourself, but be careful: you'll need a lot of luck to find animals.
You'll have to face the bitter cold, to warm up set up a fire in a cave or any other structure you can find.
Use the plants you find near your home to make a farm, melt some ice to get water, and then boil it in a furnace or use a campfire.
Good luck and have fun!

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Dear Mr. Eitan,

Following a thorough review of your application and interview, we are pleased to offer you the position of researcher at Nuclear Technology & Research.

Your primary responsibilities and duties will include:
1.	Make photos of your surroundings, animals and plants and send these photos to the office.
2.	Soil analysis, search and study of various minerals and sending reports to the office.
Your first day of employment is scheduled for 18 July, 2017.

We are confident that your expertise and professional qualities will be a valuable asset to our team and will significantly contribute to the success of our projects and the advancement of Nuclear Technology & Research.
We look forward to a successful and productive collaboration.
</details>
